cols.description: asserts the new row's cell count matches the table grid. The row is structurally locked to the existing <a:tblGrid> — to widen, add a column first (or set gridSpan on cell 1 to merge into a wider span). Defaults to the existing grid column count when omitted.
cols.readback: n/a (structural — cell count surfaces via DocumentNode.Children, not Format)

height.description: row height in EMU-parseable length. Defaults to first-row height or ~1cm.
